spec_match.rationale: Chromium-catches-up feature — the spec already documents the behaviour, so the value of the demo is the interop story. The concept exercises one corner but the before/after comparison isn't always crisp.

interactive.rationale: 0 buttons / 4 inputs / 0 selects / 0 ranges driving live JS — well past the static-card bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept page lede restates the feature-index blurb's key promise (overlap on beat, fill, presentation, rule).

edge_cases.rationale: Demo runs the happy path; no visible feature detection, error handling, or no-support fallback in the script.

references.rationale: Page includes the chromestatus.com/feature/5134266027606016 link in the see-also section.

design_system.rationale: Mostly on the design system but 7 raw hex literal(s) leaked into inline CSS — should be replaced with the --accent / --text / --bg variables.

openQuestions.title: Cover the spec aspect: :hover state inside a <use> instance — the canonical fix
openQuestions.detail: The svg2-css-cascading feature's headline framing — CSS selectors match against the <use> instantiation tree (not the original), so :hover etc. work inside <use> instances — calls out ":hover state inside a <use> instance — the canonical fix". This concept page does not exercise that, so the spec story is incomplete from this page alone. Either extend this demo or land a sibling concept dedicated to it.

openQuestions.title: Cover the spec aspect: theming via <use> with cascaded custom properties
openQuestions.detail: The svg2-css-cascading feature's headline framing — CSS selectors match against the <use> instantiation tree (not the original), so :hover etc. work inside <use> instances — calls out "theming via <use> with cascaded custom properties". This concept page does not exercise that, so the spec story is incomplete from this page alone. Either extend this demo or land a sibling concept dedicated to it.

openQuestions.title: Replace raw hex colours with design-system variables
openQuestions.detail: Found 7 raw hex literal(s) in the inline <style> block. The shared system defines --accent-blue, --accent-emerald, --accent-rose, --bg-ivory, --bg-paper, --bg-stone, --text-black, --text-charcoal, --text-muted. Swap them in and re-check WCAG AA contrast.

openQuestions.title: Cover at least one realistic failure mode
openQuestions.detail: Add feature detection at the top of the script and surface the result. Handle the permission-denied / API-rejection case in the catch branch with a visible message. If the feature is flag-gated or origin-trial, show explicitly what the page does when the API is absent.

summary: svg-cascade under svg2-css-cascading: 3 pass / 3 partial / 0 fail. Strong interactive surface, design-system drift, spec story is partial — see open questions for the angles still missing.
